data.title: Harena Resources Announces £1.2 Million Fundraising and Board Restructuring
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Citius Resources PLC ( (GB:HREE) ) has issued an update.

Harena Resources Plc has announced a proposed fundraising of up to £1.2 million through a placing of new ordinary shares, aimed at advancing the Ampasindava Project in Madagascar. The company also plans significant board changes, with the appointment of Ivan Murphy and Paul Richards, both of whom have extensive knowledge of the project, as Non-Executive Chairman and Director respectively. The proceeds from the fundraising will be used to progress key milestones for the project, including feasibility and environmental studies, and provide additional working capital. The appointment of Allenby Capital as joint broker and financial adviser is also expected to strengthen the company’s financial strategy.

Spark’s Take on GB:HREE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:HREE is a Underperform.

Citius Resources PLC faces critical financial and technical challenges, with no revenue and poor market indicators dominating the outlook. While positive corporate events suggest potential upside, these factors are overshadowed by the company’s ongoing financial distress and negative technical trends.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:HREE stock, click here.

More about Citius Resources PLC

Harena Resources Plc is a rare earths exploration and development company focused on the Ampasindava Ionic Clay Rare Earth Project in Madagascar. The project is notable for hosting one of the largest ionic clay rare earth deposits outside of China, with significant concentrations of high-value magnet metals. Harena aims to provide a sustainable supply of critical minerals for the global energy transition and military defense industries.

Average Trading Volume: 359,853

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £5.79M

For an in-depth examination of HREE stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

FEC Resources ( (FECOF) ) has provided an announcement.

FEC Resources Inc., a company listed as FECOF, has announced the settlement of a loan with PXP Energy Corporation by converting the debt into equity. This strategic move involved the issuance of 131,563,725 common shares to cover a debt of $1,157,760.78, potentially strengthening FEC’s financial position and reducing its liabilities.

data.title: Jiuzi Holdings Reports Improved Financial Performance for H1 2025
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Jiuzi Holdings ( (JZXN) ) just unveiled an update.

On July 31, 2025, Jiuzi Holdings Inc. released its unaudited interim financial statements for the six months ending April 30, 2025. The company reported a net loss of $675,742, a significant improvement from the $15.8 million loss in the same period in 2024. Despite a decrease in total assets and shareholders’ equity, the company managed to achieve a gross profit of $14,124, compared to a loss in the previous year. This financial performance indicates a positive shift in the company’s operations, potentially impacting its market position and stakeholder confidence.

More about Jiuzi Holdings

Jiuzi Holdings Inc. operates in the electric vehicle industry, focusing on the sale of new energy vehicles and related services in China. The company is headquartered in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, and is involved in the economic and technological development sector.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

REC Silicon ASA ( (RNWEF) ) has shared an update.

REC Silicon ASA announced the completion of a voluntary offer by Anchor AS to acquire all outstanding shares, followed by an unconditional mandatory offer approved by the Norwegian Financial Supervisory Authority. The offer price is set at NOK 2.20 per share, with the acceptance period running from August 1 to August 29, 2025. This acquisition could potentially impact the company’s market positioning and shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (RNWEF) stock is a Hold with a NOK8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on REC Silicon ASA stock, see the RNWEF Stock Forecast page.

REC Silicon ASA operates in the renewable energy sector, focusing on the production of silicon materials primarily used in solar and electronics industries. The company is known for its high-purity polysilicon products and has a significant presence in the global solar energy market.
